message:
fix: make Kyverno policy rows open insights drilldown view (#3805) (#3810)

Clicking a policy row in the Kyverno Policies card or the cluster detail
modal now opens the PolicyDrillDown view with full policy insights
(overview, violations, spec, AI analysis) instead of just opening the
cluster-level modal. The modal policy rows also show violation counts
and a chevron to indicate they are clickable.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
